name: Chile Lime Chipotle Chicken
steps: Slice the chicken into thin cutlets
Add in olive oil, salt, pepper, all of the above seasonings, yogurt, honey, and lemon juice
Slice up the onions and mix it in with the chicken
Preheat the oven to 425 F, remove the chicken from the fridge to come to room temp (30 min), then pack tightly inside a small pan (20 in squared)
Bake the oven for 55 min, then cut the chicken into strips
